violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. PIC replaced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (deli slicer, veggie slicer, tomato slicer, knife rack) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC washed/sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the food containers have an accumulation old stickers/labels. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2025

Inspector observed a dark yellow puddle from an unidentified source in the basement area with some moisture observed on a wall and condensation/slight drip from an overhead pipe. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2025
Inspector observed an accumulation of trash and debris around refuse area. PIC cleaned up area. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2025
The floor tiles in the kitchen office area is in poor repair (worn/exposed wooden floorboard. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2025
The ceiling in the prep area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2024

The wall in basement behind soda dispensing lines have an accumulation of black residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2024
